from __future__ import annotations

import tarfile


def tar_extractall_unfiltered_negative(archive: str, dest: str) -> None:
    with tarfile.open(archive) as tar:
        safe_members = [m for m in tar.getmembers() if not (m.name.startswith("/") or ".." in m.name)]
        tar.extractall(dest, members=safe_members)
